items.title: Look outside of tech for market winners, Jim Cramer says
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer named stocks worth buying outside of the tech sector.

items.title: Final Trade: LMAT, REGN, BA, TJX
items.description: The final trades of the day with CNBC's Melissa Lee and the 'Fast Money' traders.

items.title: M&S hires BA boss after chairman attacked airline’s service
items.description: Marks & Spencer has appointed the boss of British Airways to its board after the retailer’s chairman criticised the airline’s declining service.

items.title: The Gaza War Has Been Big Business for U.S. Companies
items.description: Two years on, Israel’s war in Gaza might be finally drawing to a close.  Sales of U.S. weapons to Israel have surged since October 2023, with Washington approving more than $32 billion in armaments, ammunition and other equipment to the Israeli military over that time, according to a Wall Street Journal analysis of State Department disclosures.

items.title: Howmet's Commercial Aerospace Market Gains Momentum: Can It Sustain?
items.description: HWM continues to witness commercial aerospace strength as engine product sales surge, fueled by new aircraft and strong spare parts needs.
